title: Australia芒鈧劉s Largest Import of Sustainable Aviation Fuel Lands in Sydney
content: Qantas, Sydney Airport and Ampol, supported by Qantas芒鈧劉 SAF Coalition partners, have today marked the largest ever commercial importation of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) into Australia, with nearly two million litres of unblended SAF arriving this week. Sustainable Aviation Fuel has the greatest near-term potential to help decarbonise the aviation industry.
author: Analysts Account
